creator: k@numeri.campus.luth.se
text:
Hi Stefan

I have just closed your PR 3299 from April 1997.
I did this because your email address in that PR 
'sec@quit.42.org' is not valid.

See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3299 
for the deatils of the PR.

However, alot has happened with the console driver
since the 2.2.1 days.

If this is still a problem in more recent version of 
FreeBSD (for example 4.1-RELEASE) please open a new
problem report.

Thanks
Johan K
